hero.title: undef games
hero.copy: Indie developer building game tools and systems for fun shared experiences online and off.

products_intro.title: Projects built to be used, watched, and played with.

products.label: TradeWars: WARP Agent Runtime Platform
products.description: The flagship route: a live alpha platform for TradeWars runtime, automation, and operator tooling.

products.label: Undef Dice
products.description: Dice and table tools for shared play at the table and on the network.

products.label: Taybols
products.description: Smaller experiments, generators, and odd little utilities with room to become bigger systems.

identity.title: Good systems should make shared play easier to reach.
identity.copy: undef games builds the technical side of play so people can gather, operate, and have fun across digital and physical spaces.

signal.title: Shared play needs strong systems underneath it.
signal.copy: The site stays active and readable while pointing people toward the products, tools, and experiments that make play easier to share online and off.

warp.title: TradeWars: WARP Agent Runtime Platform.
warp.copy: A live alpha platform for runtime control, automation, and operator tooling around TradeWars.

dice.title: Undef Dice keeps shared play moving.
dice.copy: Fast dice and lightweight utilities for groups who want clearer game moments online and off.

taybols.title: Taybols keeps the smaller ideas in circulation.
taybols.copy: Generators, utility tools, and playful experiments that can grow into finished systems.

closing.title: Built for people to play together.
